Petn. For Appointment Of Successor Personal Representative, For Issuance Of Letters Of Admin., & For Auth. To Independent Admin.
Off Calendar Jul-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order

For Removal Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jul-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: William Pedder appearing for and with Gerald Austin, Sr.. The administrator Gregory Austin is in court. The administator has failed to do anything. Court is removing him as the administrator. Gerald Austin, Sr. is appointed as successor administrator. Bond is fixed in the amount of $68,000.00. Two orders signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause Re Removal Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jul-11-2006 Text Ruling

For Removal Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Continued To Jul-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: William Pedder appearing for petitioner. Kevin McDonough appearing by phone for Gregory Austin, Sr. and as petitioner on his Motion to withdraw as attorney. Gregory Austin is not in court. Mr. McDonough has not heard from his client. The notice he mailed to his client did not come back. Court is granting the Motion to Withdraw as attorney. Order signed. Court is ordering an OSC to Gregory Austin with a return date on 7/11. Counsel to prepare OSC. Matter is continued to 7/11. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Motion To Withdraw As Attorney Of Record; Declaration Of Kevin C. Mcdonough; Memorandum Of Pts And Authorities
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order

Petn. For Appointment Of Successor Personal Representative, For Issuance Of Letters Of Admin., & For Auth. To Independent Admin.
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Continued To Jul-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. For Appointment Of Successor Personal Representative, For Issuance Of Letters Of Admin., & For Auth. To Independent Admin.
Off Calendar Apr-18-2006 Continued To May-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

For Removal Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Apr-18-2006 Continued To May-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: WILLIAM PEDDER FOR GERALD AUSTIN; KEVIN MC DONOUGH APPEARED BY TELEPHONE FOR GREGORY AUSTIN. MR MC DONOUGH INFORMS THE COURT THAT HE WAS NOT AWARE THAT HE WAS STILL REPRESENTING MR GREGORY AUSTIN. HE HAS NOT SPOKEN TO HIM IN 14 YEARS. THE COURT DIRECTS MR MC DONOUGH TO FILE A MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL. MR PEDDER IS TO REFILE HIS PETITION ON THE JUDICIAL COUNSEL FORMS. BOTH MATTERS WILL BE CONTINUED TO MAY 16, 2006 AND HEARD WITH MR MC DONOUGHS MOTION. AN OSC WILL ISSUED TO GREGORY AUSTIN IF HE DOES NOT APPEAR. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera
